name: Ranpirnase
description: Ranpirnase is a ribonuclease enzyme found in Rana pipiens oocytes. It is being studied in the treatment of cancer. It is manufactured by Alfacell Corporation. It is the first ribonuclease to enter cancer clinical trials.
indication: For the treatment of various forms of cancer.
mechanismOfAction: Ranpirnase controls tumour growth by degrading RNA within cancer cells, resulting in inhibition of protein synthesis and arresting mitosis in G(1)phase.

interactions.name: Trastuzumab
interactions.description: Trastuzumab may increase the cardiotoxic activities of Ranpirnase.

interactions.name: Paclitaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Paclitaxel is combined with Ranpirnase.

interactions.name: Docetaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Docetaxel is combined with Ranpirnase.

interactions.name: Cabazitaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Cabazitaxel is combined with Ranpirnase.
